## Summary / 摘要

- What does this PR change?
- 这个 PR 具体改了什么？

## Why / 背景

- Why is this change needed?
- 为什么需要这次改动？

## Testing / 测试

- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `dart test` if Dart backend code changed / 如改了 Dart 后端再运行
- [ ] Manual validation if needed / 如有需要已做手工验证

## Localization Impact / 多语言影响

- [ ] No user-facing text changed / 没有改用户可见文案
- [ ] I updated localized copy where needed / 已同步补齐相关语言文案
- [ ] I checked RTL-sensitive UI if applicable / 如涉及 RTL 已检查布局

## Checklist / 自检清单

- [ ] I did not introduce fake AI fallback behavior
- [ ] I preserved offline-first behavior on critical paths
- [ ] I added or updated tests when behavior changed
- [ ] I kept user-facing strategist copy clear and actionable
